steps.title: Identify what accomplishes the goal
steps.content: The goal is explicit: identify the title of Zora Neale Hurston's first published short story. Any effective answer must directly name it.

steps.title: Match the requirement to the choices
steps.content: B directly accomplishes this by naming the title: “John Redding Goes to Sea.” The other three options provide related information—the year, the publication venue, or the genre—but none states the actual title needed to accomplish the goal. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
